contracts:chain-id-lockbox-caps-pause-re.evidence: chain ID 8453, ignored lockbox config, caps, allowlist, pause, release/recovery, and replay protections need contract evidence
contracts:chain-id-lockbox-caps-pause-re.nextAction: Contracts agent adds the dedicated pilot contracts gate.

bridge:observe-credit-replay-withdrawal.evidence: Base observation, deterministic credit, duplicate handling, and withdrawal/release evidence need relayer evidence
bridge:observe-credit-replay-withdrawal.nextAction: Bridge relayer agent adds the dedicated pilot bridge gate.

runtime:credit-once-restart-export.evidence: local runtime must apply pilot credits exactly once and preserve state across restart/export/import
runtime:credit-once-restart-export.nextAction: Chain runtime agent adds the dedicated pilot runtime gate.

wallet:operator-signing-and-negative-vec.evidence: operator wallet must sign pilot messages and reject wrong chain, wrong contract, replay, expiry, and missing cap fields
wallet:operator-signing-and-negative-vec.nextAction: Wallet/operator agent adds the dedicated pilot wallet gate.

control-dashboard:api-and-owner-views.evidence: API and dashboard must expose pilot status, credits, withdrawal, emergency state, redaction, labels, and next commands
control-dashboard:api-and-owner-views.nextAction: Control-plane/dashboard agent adds the dedicated pilot evidence gate.

ops:env-ack-emergency-export-restart.evidence: ops path must verify env, tiny caps, explicit owner ack, emergency stop, no-secret export, and restart recovery
ops:env-ack-emergency-export-restart.nextAction: Ops/installer agent adds the dedicated pilot ops gate.
